opposite_face_label: Which option shows the face opposite the marked face when the net is folded into a cube?
When folded into a cube, which option is opposite the marked face?
Choose the option for the face opposite the marked reference face.
Which labeled option corresponds to the cube face opposite the marked face?
Identify the option whose face is opposite the marked face after folding.
marked_edge_neighbor_face_label: Which option shows the face that touches the red marked edge when the net is folded into a cube?
When folded into a cube, which option is adjacent across the red marked edge?
Choose the option for the face connected through the red marked edge after folding.
Which labeled option touches the red marked edge on the folded cube?
Identify the option whose face shares the red marked edge after the net is folded.
equivalent_net_label: Which option folds into the same colored cube as the reference net, allowing the cube to be turned?
Choose the candidate net that makes the same colored cube as the reference after folding and turning the cube.
Which labeled option is equivalent to the reference colored cube net after folding?
After folding, which option has the same cube-face coloring as the reference net, up to cube rotation?
Identify the option whose colored net folds to the same cube as the reference.

task:opposite_face_label_query.object_description: a labeled cube net with one marked reference face and labeled face options
task:opposite_face_label_query.annotation_hint: Set annotation to the image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] of the chosen option card.

task:marked_edge_neighbor_face_label_que.object_description: a labeled cube net with one red marked edge and labeled face options
task:marked_edge_neighbor_face_label_que.annotation_hint: Set annotation to the image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] of the chosen option card.

task:equivalent_net_label_query.object_description: a reference colored cube net and four labeled candidate colored cube nets
task:equivalent_net_label_query.annotation_hint: Set annotation to the image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] of the chosen option net panel.
